{{Infobox character
| name = Red Faith
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Sage of Red Faith, Blood Sage, Forger, Monarch
| abilities = blood madra, Striker technique, Ruler technique, Enforcer technique, follow through space, blood and aura, blood essence, nine daggers, blood and sword aura, launcher construct
| affiliations = Redmoon Hall, Blood Icon
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Red Faith Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Red]] Faith refers to both a powerful individual and an associated sect. The [[Sage of Red Faith]] is a tall, skeletal man with long white hair and red markings beneath his eyes that resemble bloody tears. He is a practitioner of [[blood madra]], utilizing techniques such as blood-based [[Striker]] attacks and [[Enforcer]] methods that can manifest as claws or red light. He is known for his tutelage of students, including a [[Truegold]] recruit, and has been involved in research regarding spiritual composition. The [[Sage]] is characterized by his intense emotions, often oscillating between rage and lunacy, and he has struggled with a flaw that prevented his ascension to the rank of [[Monarch]]. The [[Red]] Faith entity is also linked to a [[Herald]] named [[Redmoon]], who serves as the [[Sage]]'s opposite. While the [[Sage]] is pale and skeletal, the [[Herald]] possesses bright red hair, pink skin, and crimson eyes. The two are part of a group that includes the [[Redmoon Hall]], which operates under the symbol of the [[Twin Star Sect]]. The [[Sage]] has been noted for encouraging the spread of [[Blood Shadows]] on the wild and has engaged in conflicts involving various factions, including interactions with [[Malice]] and [[Reigan Shen]].}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red]] Faith is a practitioner of [[blood madra]] who has lost his original name. Characterized by pure white hair and skin, he utilizes a diverse combat repertoire including [[Ruler]], [[Enforcer]], and [[Striker techniques]], the latter of which takes on a bird-like aspect. During combat, he employs his claws to successfully breach [[Eithan]]'s armor.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] has pure white skin and hair.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] has lost his name.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] uses [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] uses a [[Striker technique]] that takes on the aspect of a bird.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] uses a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] uses an [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]]'s claws breached [[Eithan]]'s armor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] has claws.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27" />}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Red Faith]] is the [[Sage of Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Red Faith]] is described as a cockroach walking like a man.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red]] Faith is the mind in his relationship with the [[Herald]] and possesses Goldsigns that resemble trails of blood. Seeking to fuel [[Yerin Arelius]]'s advancement through his experiments, he hunts her by following through space. He utilizes blood and [[aura]] to maintain his calm while pursuing his interests in [[Yerin]]'s unique methods. His presence was eventually sensed within the [[Redmoon Hall]] vessel.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] is interested in [[Yerin Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] has Goldsigns that look like trails of blood.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] can follow through space.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] intends to fuel [[Yerin Arelius]]'s advancement as part of his experiments.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] is hunting for [[Yerin Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] is the mind in his relationship with the [[Herald]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] uses blood and [[aura]] to calm himself.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] is sensed within the [[Redmoon Hall]] vessel.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Red Faith]] is a group interested in [[Yerin]]'s methods.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|After surviving a lightning summoning by a [[Herald]], the [[Blood Sage]] [[Red]] Faith entered into a soul oath that bound him to [[Yerin]]. As a [[Forger]] and researcher of her unique condition, he assisted her by offering guidance on drawing in blood essence. Although he had previously failed an ascension to [[Monarch]], [[Red]] Faith is a long-standing [[Monarch]] who utilizes nine daggers infused with blood and [[sword aura]]. During combat, he employs a launcher construct made from an ancient natural treasure cauldron that releases green and black madra with aspects of death and venom. Despite being a member of [[Redmoon Hall]], he maintains that he is not like [[Redmoon]] and provided protection to the group even as the [[Bleeding Phoenix]] shredded him.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Herald]] was seen summoning lightning against [[Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is bound to [[Yerin]] by a soul oath.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] provided [[Yerin]] with pointers on drawing in blood essence.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is a [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is tied to the [[Blood Icon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] failed his ascension to [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is a researcher of [[Yerin]]'s unique condition.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is a [[Forger]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is a member of [[Redmoon Hall]] and identifies as not being like [[Redmoon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] uses nine daggers.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]]'s daggers use blood and [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] explains that the [[Phoenix]] uses a person's body as a medium to reach others.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is a character who finds [[Heralds]] difficult to deal with if they die without leaving a [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is a character who spoke to [[Redmoon]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] is a [[Monarch]] with a long history.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] uses a launcher construct made from an ancient natural treasure cauldron.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]]'s cauldron launcher releases green and black madra with aspects of venom and death.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Bleeding Phoenix]] shreds [[Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]]'s combat involves blood and [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Red Faith]] provided protection to the group.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Red Faith]] is dead.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c8">''Waybound'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Red Faith]] provides lectures to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Red Faith]] added designs to a concept based on the [[Phoenix]] [[madra]]'s ability to create bloodspawn.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Break,” he commanded, adding authority to his Ruler technique.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“I know he’s a cockroach walking like a man, but he did help me out of a tough spot.”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“That you remain here instead of hunting for Yerin Arelius, as I have done, only proves that you do not deserve the independence you stole.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“If you believe you are the mind in our relationship, then it should not trouble you so much to think.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“He’s using his body as a medium for the Phoenix to reach us,” Red Faith explained<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
